message:
Add defensive validation to parsePlanResponse and loadAgentSpec

Addresses code quality review findings:
- parsePlanResponse validates goal argument type and rejects non-array hints
- loadAgentSpec validates required fields (name, description, system_prompt, model)
- loadBootstrapAgents sorts files for deterministic ordering
- Added tests for malformed YAML and missing goal arguments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
